immutable-by-default.notes: readonly on CartItem.weight, Cart.items (readonly array), ShippingResult.itemCosts. Primitives are inherently immutable.

no-magic-numbers.notes: All numeric values extracted to named constants: HEAVY_WEIGHT_KG, MEDIUM_WEIGHT_KG, rates, surcharges, multipliers, LIGHT_FLAT_COST.

strict-typing.notes: CountryCode union type exists. Interfaces for Cart, CartItem, ShippingResult. Function signatures are typed. The 'as CountryCode' cast in getCountryMultiplier is a smell but types are present.

externalize-config.notes: All configuration (rates, thresholds, multipliers, country codes) is hardcoded as module-level constants. Rule requires externalization to env vars or a config/defaults file. These are business parameters that change across environments.

bound-every-input.notes: CRITICAL FAIL. (1) getCountryMultiplier silently falls back to INTERNATIONAL_MULTIPLIER via ?? for unknown countries -- rule explicitly says 'REJECT invalid, never silent fallback/default'. (2) No validation that item weights are positive -- negative or zero weights silently produce LIGHT_FLAT_COST. (3) Empty cart (items.length === 0) silently returns totalShipping: 0 instead of rejecting.
